name: The Tickling Maid Café
description:
The Tickling Maid Café has recently opened near your place and started an advertisement promotion to celebrate:

Anyone coming in the business carrying a flyer from the campaign will receive a coupon to test a 'full course' option for free.

The flyer didn't really explain what the café is about or what a full course is, but your love of free stuff has nonetheless brought you to its door with a flyer in your hands.
creator: Asder66
